title: Yijing Hexagram 37: Jia Ren (The Family)
description: Hexagram 37 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 37 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Family. The perseverance of the woman furthers. Wind comes forth from fire.
